description: Test dataset for evaluating the RAG system with ground truth answers

questions.question: What is Infineon Technologies?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon Technologies AG is a world leader in semiconductor solutions that make life easier, safer, and greener. The company was founded in 1999 as a spin-off from Siemens AG.

questions.question: When was Infineon founded?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon was founded on April 1, 1999 as a spin-off from Siemens AG.

questions.question: What are the main business segments of Infineon?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon operates through four business segments: Automotive (ATV) with ~44% revenue share, Green Industrial Power (GIP) with ~20%, Power & Sensor Systems (PSS) with ~28%, and Connected Secure Systems (CSS) with ~8%.

questions.question: Where is Infineon headquartered?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon is headquartered in Neubiberg (Munich), Germany.

questions.question: What products does Infineon make for electric vehicles?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon makes Silicon Carbide (SiC) MOSFETs (CoolSiC family), IGBT Modules (HybridPACK family), and Gate Drivers (EiceDRIVER family) for electric vehicles. These are used in traction inverters, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters.

questions.question: What is Infineon's sustainability strategy?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon aims to be carbon neutral by 2030 for Scope 1 and 2 emissions, with a target of 70% reduction in CO2 emissions by 2025 and 100% renewable electricity by 2030.

questions.question: What skills are needed for an internship at Infineon?
questions.expected_answer: Internships at Infineon require being a currently enrolled student in a relevant field (EE, CS, Physics), good English skills, Python programming, and machine learning frameworks knowledge for AI/MLOps positions.

questions.question: What is Infineon's AI strategy?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon leverages AI across manufacturing excellence (predictive maintenance, automated optical inspection), product development (AI-assisted chip design), supply chain optimization, and enterprise AI solutions including an internal LLM initiative with RAG.

questions.question: Who is the CEO of Infineon?
questions.expected_answer: The CEO of Infineon is Jochen Hanebeck.

questions.question: What radar products does Infineon offer for autonomous driving?
questions.expected_answer: Infineon offers the RASIC family of 77GHz automotive radar ICs for autonomous driving applications including adaptive cruise control, blind spot detection, autonomous emergency braking, and parking assistance.

notes: Ground truth answers are based on actual document content in data/sample_docs/
expected_answer provides the ideal response for accuracy evaluation
expected_answer_contains lists required terms that MUST appear in the answer
expected_topics lists related terms for semantic similarity scoring
relevant_sources maps to actual files in the corpus for retrieval evaluation
